title: lastrea aristata
intro: Lastrea aristata, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. Traditionally, the Lastrea aristata plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea aristata include the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lastrea aristata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
